bead.title: Stage 1.1: draft schema.graphql types + queries
bead.description: Draft the initial GraphQL schema covering all types and query entry points needed by the new SvelteKit UI. Create new file cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql. Schema must include: Node, Project, Bead/BeadConnection/BeadEdge (Relay cursor connection), Document, DocGraph, Commit/CommitConnection, Worker, AgentSession, Persona, ExecutionRun, CoordinatorMetrics. Every field doc-commented. Every existing GET /api/* list endpoint in cli/internal/server/server.go:334-417 must have a corresponding Query. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #1 for full context.
bead.acceptance: (1) File cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql exists and parses: `go run github.com/99designs/gqlgen generate --config cli/internal/server/graphql/gqlgen.yml` (or a dry-run equivalent) completes without schema errors. (2) Manual: open the file and point at each GET /api/* in server.go:334-417 — for each, name the GraphQL Query that replaces it. No REST endpoint is orphaned. (3) Every type field has a doc comment. (4) Relay cursor connections used on every list (no offset/limit).

events.body:
agent: identical tool calls repeated, aborting loop
result_rev=ad0a9498b6043afe428d4e6b117cd6c2000274eb
base_rev=599157e8128981c299fc57b368be96799e36917e

Opus review of commit f8761ba (was ad0a949 in worktree) against this bead acceptance.

Verdict: APPROVE_WITH_EDITS — schema is a good draft but needs these fixes:

1. ADD missing queries covering REST endpoints:
   - health: HealthStatus! (covers GET /api/health)
   - ready: ReadyStatus! (covers GET /api/ready)
   - workerLog(workerID: ID!): String! (covers GET /api/agent/workers/{id}/log)
   - workerPrompt(workerID: ID!): String! (covers GET /api/agent/workers/{id}/prompt)
   - agentCoordinators: [CoordinatorMetrics!]! (list form for GET /api/agent/coordinators)
   - documentByPath(path: String!): Document (covers GET /api/documents/{path...})

2. ADD per-field doc comments. Only type-level comments exist today. Acceptance criterion (3) says every field needs a doc comment. Add """...""" block above every field in every type. Biggest lift.

3. CONVERT search: [SearchResult!]! to SearchResultConnection with edges/node/cursor/pageInfo per the Relay cursor rule.

4. Leave existing content in cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql alone where possible — this is an edit pass, not a rewrite.

Starting worktree already has the file at cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql (687 lines). Read it first, then apply the fixes above, then commit.
events.source: fresh-eyes review of ad0a949 (cherry-picked as f8761ba)
events.summary: APPROVE_WITH_EDITS: 38/44 endpoints covered; per-field doc comments missing; add 6 missing queries
